title: OreLibrary
description: It is mainly an Addon for Solar Generation by 3divad99
body:
This mod it is mainly an Addon for [SolarGeneration](https://modrinth.com/mod/solargeneration) (by 3divad99) which adds the required ores. The mod adds: Ores, Ingots, Nuggets and Blends.
Blends are for the ores that you can craft and you can smelt or blast the blend for obtaining the ingot.
The mod is compatible with: Just Enough Items (JEI)
In the future i will add more ores for work with other mods but for now the mod adds the following ores:

  • Copper (found naturally)*
  • Electrum (crafted from Silver + Gold)
  • Enderium (crafted from Tin + Silver + Platinum)
  • Invar (crafted from Iron + Nickel)
  • Lead (found naturally)
  • Lumium (crafted from Silver + Tin + glowstone dust)
  • Nickel (found naturally)
  • Platinum (found naturally)
  • Signalum (crafted from Copper + Silver + redstone dust)*
  • Silver (found naturally)
  • Steel (crafted from Iron + Coal)
  • Tin (found naturally)

*You can also use Copper from Minecraft Vanilla

Feel free to use this mod on your modpack
